metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — FL
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for high-veteran-population counties.

notes.tax_rate_format: Rate per $100 of assessed value unless otherwise noted.
notes.scope: Initial release covers counties with major military installations from states in state-benefits.json.
notes.update_cycle: Tax rates typically set annually by county boards.

disabled_veteran_partial.combat_65_plus_discount: Additional percentage discount based on disability rating
